channel.title: Metal Legends - Latest News
channel.description: Stay updated with the latest heavy metal news, band releases, and tour announcements.

item.title: Metallica Announces Surprise Studio Stream
item.description: The thrash legends will be performing live from their private studio... Read the full details on Metal Legends news page.

item.title: Iron Maiden: The Future Past Tour European Dates
item.description: Iron Maiden returns to Europe with a massive new setlist. Check out the tour dates on our concerts page.

item.title: Judas Priest Working on New Studio Album
item.description: Rob Halford confirms the metal gods are already back in the studio... stay tuned for more legends news.

item.title: Slayer Reunion: Kerry King Interview
item.description: Exclusive insights on the upcoming 2026 Slayer special shows...
